details.productUrlName: Eddie Ghost of the Navigator Captain Nghathrod Rainbow Foil

customAttributes.description:
Secret Lair x Iron Maiden: Eddie Unchained

Horrors you control have menace.
Whenever a Horror you control deals combat damage to a player, that player mills that many cards.
At the beginning of your end step, choose target artifact or creature card in an opponent's graveyard that was put there from their library this turn. Put it onto the battlefield under your control.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item. The estimated shipping time frame for this product varies as sellers receive this product(s) directly from Wizards of the Coast after 10/31/2025 during a 1-10 week timeframe.
